rows.notes: P38 should codify hygiene and no-merge policy for the closed compiled-boundary wave without changing scientific stage.
P38 should make the worktree policy, large-artifact policy, and commit cadence explicit for this wave.
The clean worktree should keep tracked artifacts under the roughly 10 MiB default limit.
Shared control docs should expose P38 as the current low-priority wave and keep no-merge posture explicit.
